h1.visual_description: Large, bold, all-caps sans-serif font in black. Positioned at the top of a section, followed by a full-width horizontal rule.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, all-caps sans-serif font in a muted blue/slate color. No horizontal rule.

h3.visual_description: Not explicitly distinct in this sample, but likely follows the h2 color scheme in a smaller point size or sentence case.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small-font numbered list at the bottom of the page, separated from main text by whitespace.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Footnotes / Endnotes providing citations or supplementary commentary.

visual_matchers.pattern: Italicized Latin terms within body text.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Scientific nomenclature or specific terminology (e.g., Homo sapiens).

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Inline LaTeX for simple variables; block LaTeX for complex equations (none present in sample).
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-Date parenthetical style (e.g., Harari 2015) with corresponding numbered footnotes for detailed references.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-right footer containing the book title in all-caps sans-serif followed by Roman numeral page numbers (e.g., BEHAVIORAL ECONOMICS PRACTICUM XIX).
